subcodes.first_line: O beloved soul! I write to thee less frequently, for I am occupied with my work, even remaining wakeful some nights [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای جان عزیز نامه بشما کمتر نگارم زیرا در کارم حتی بعضی شبها بیدارم یا نامه
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @personal instructions, @praise and encouragement, @business; financial; property matters
